data.content: Planning completed for foolery-2b52. Recommended implementation is a bounded documentation pass: codify the shipped shared-runtime behavior in docs/interactive-agent-session-protocol.md, covering capabilities, startup handshake, prompt transport, normalized stream events, turn-complete vs step/session completion, follow-up prompting, stdin close/drain, process exit and post-exit validation, plus watchdog/retry/abort semantics. Likely companion touch is docs/MANIFEST.md for discoverability. Key source files to ground the document are src/lib/agent-session-capabilities.ts, src/lib/agent-adapter.ts, src/lib/agent-session-runtime.ts, src/lib/terminal-manager-initial-io.ts, src/lib/terminal-manager-take-loop.ts, src/lib/terminal-manager-take-iteration.ts, and src/lib/terminal-manager-workflow.ts. Primary risk is documenting turn completion as success; the doc must state that workflow success is only decided after exit plus backend state validation/classification. No child knots were created because scope is a single documentation artifact.
